query:
SELECT j.id
            FROM jobs j
            LEFT JOIN reactions r ON r.job_id = j.id
            WHERE (?1 IS NULL OR j.platform = ?1)
              AND (?2 IS NULL OR j.rating = ?2)
              AND (?3 IS NULL OR IIF(r.applied_at IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) = ?3)
              AND (?4 IS NULL OR j.remote = ?4)
              AND j.vectorized = TRUE
            ORDER BY j.id
